Integration
Hermes
  1. Docs
  2. Getting Started
  3. Configuration

Configuration

Mnemosyne is configured via environment variables and (in Hermes Agent) through config.yaml. All settings have sensible defaults so you can get started with zero configuration.

Constructor Parameters

The only runtime parameters are passed directly to the Mnemosyne() constructor:

from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne

mem = Mnemosyne(
    session_id="my-agent",   # Scope working memories to this session
    db_path="./data/mem.db", # Custom database path (optional)
)
ParameterTypeDefaultDescription
session_idstr"default"Session identifier for scoping working memories
db_path`strNone`None

Hermes Provider Config (config.yaml)

These keys live under memory.mnemosyne in Hermes Agent's config.yaml.

KeyDefaultDescription
auto_sleepFalseAuto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold
sleep_threshold50Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers
vector_typeint8Vector storage type (float32, int8, bit)
ignore_patterns[]Regex patterns to filter from memory storage
profile_isolationFalsePer-profile memory isolation via Mnemosyne banks
shared_surface_pathdata/shared/mnemosyne.dbSQLite path for shared surface memories
shared_surface_readFalseMerge shared-surface results into private bank recall
skip_contextscron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loopAgent contexts to skip Mnemosyne init
sync_roles['user', 'assistant']Conversation roles to autosave in sync_turn()

Environment Variables

Storage & Data Directories

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR~/.hermes/mnemosyne/dataDirectory for database, logs, models, and stats
MNEMOSYNE_HOME~/.hermes/mnemosyneOverride home directory for all Mnemosyne data
MNEMOSYNE_SHARED_DB_PATHdata/shared/mnemosyne.dbSQLite path for shared surface memory DB
MNEMOSYNE_BLOB_DIR—Directory for blob storage (content sanitizer output)
MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE1Auto-migrate DB schema on startup (set to 0 to disable)

Memory Tiers & Eviction

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS10000Maximum items in working memory before eviction
MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS24Hours before working memory entries expire
MNEMOSYNE_EP_LIMIT50000Max episodic memories returned per recall
MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX1000Maximum scratchpad entries
MNEMOSYNE_RECENCY_HALFLIFE168Recency decay halflife in hours (default: 1 week)
MNEMOSYNE_TEMPORAL_HALFLIFE_HOURS24Temporal voice halflife for time-weighted recall scoring
MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_BATCH5000Batch size for sleep consolidation

Auto Sleep & Shutdown

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLEDfalseEnable automatic sleep consolidation (Hermes provider)
MNEMOSYNE_SESSION_END_TIMEOUT15Max seconds for session-end sleep
MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_TIMEOUT5Max seconds for auto-sleep cycle
MNEMOSYNE_SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TIMEOUT2Max seconds to drain LLM queue on shutdown
MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_PROMPT—Custom prompt for sleep LLM consolidation

Tiered Degradation & Compression

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS30Days before memories enter Tier 2 (compressed)
MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS180Days before memories enter Tier 3 (summary only)
MNEMOSYNE_TIER1_WEIGHT1.0Scoring weight for Tier 1 (fresh) memories
MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_WEIGHT0.5Scoring weight for Tier 2 (compressed) memories
MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_WEIGHT0.25Scoring weight for Tier 3 (summary) memories
MNEMOSYNE_DEGRADE_BATCH100Batch size for tiered degradation pass
MNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESStrueUse LLM for smart tiered compression instead of truncation
MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS300Max character length for Tier 3 summaries
MNEMOSYNE_USE_CAVEMANfalseUse caveman/AAAK encoding fallback for consolidation

Veracity Weights

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT1.0Veracity weight for stated (user-asserted) memories
MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT0.7Veracity weight for inferred (LLM-extracted) memories
MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT0.5Veracity weight for tool-returned memories
MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT0.6Veracity weight for externally imported memories
MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT0.8Veracity weight for memories with unknown source

Embeddings & Vector Search

Mnemosyne uses BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 via fastembed (384 dimensions) for local embedding generation. No external API key is needed.

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPEint8Vector storage format (int8, float32, float16, binary)
MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_MODELBAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5fastembed model for vector embeddings
MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_DIM384Override embedding vector dimension
MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY—API key for cloud embedding provider
MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URLhttps://openrouter.ai/api/v1API endpoint for cloud embeddings
MNEMOSYNE_NO_EMBEDDINGSfalseDisable dense vector retrieval entirely
MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDINGS_VIA_APIfalseForce cloud API mode for embeddings
MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_FALLBACK_MODEL—Local fastembed model for API fallback (v3.8.0)

Scoring Weights (Hybrid Ranking)

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_VEC_WEIGHT0.5Vector similarity weight in hybrid ranking
MNEMOSYNE_FTS_WEIGHT0.3Full-text search weight in hybrid ranking
MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTANCE_WEIGHT0.2Importance score weight in hybrid ranking

LLM Configuration (Sleep Summarization)

The sleep cycle uses an LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory. Can run locally or via an external API.

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_ENABLEDtrueEnable LLM summarization during sleep consolidation
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL—OpenAI-compatible API base URL for remote LLM
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_API_KEY—API key for remote LLM endpoint
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MODEL—Model identifier for remote LLM calls
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MAX_TOKENS2048Max output tokens per LLM summary
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_N_CTX2048Context window size for local LLM
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_N_THREADS4CPU threads for local LLM inference
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_REPOopenbmb/MiniCPM5-1B-GGUFHuggingFace repo for GGUF model
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FILEMiniCPM5-1B-Q4_K_M.ggufGGUF filename for local LLM
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FALLBACK_BASE_URL—Fallback API URL when primary remote LLM fails
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FALLBACK_API_KEY—API key for fallback LLM endpoint
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FALLBACK_MODELS—Comma-separated fallback model names
MNEMOSYNE_FORCE_LOCALfalseSkip remote LLM and use local model directly
MNEMOSYNE_LLM_CONFLICT_DETECTIONfalseEnable LLM-based conflict detection during sleep
MNEMOSYNE_CONFLICT_LLM_BASE_URL—API base URL for conflict detection LLM
MNEMOSYNE_CONFLICT_LLM_API_KEY—API key for conflict detection LLM
MNEMOSYNE_CONFLICT_LLM_MODEL—Model for conflict detection LLM calls
MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLEDfalseRoute consolidation through host-provided LLM adapter
MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_MODEL—Model override for host LLM adapter
MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_PROVIDER—Provider override for host LLM adapter (e.g. openai-codex)
MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_N_CTX32000Context window budget when using host LLM adapter

Entity & Fact Extraction

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_EXTRACTION_MODELgoogle/gemini-2.5-flashModel for entity/fact extraction via OpenRouter
MNEMOSYNE_EXTRACTION_PROMPT—Custom prompt for entity/fact extraction

BEAM & Polyphonic Features (Experimental)

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_BEAM_OPTIMIZATIONSfalseEnable BEAM benchmark optimizations (feature flag)
MNEMOSYNE_ENHANCED_RECALL0Enable enhanced recall pipeline (fact+graph+episodic fusion)
MNEMOSYNE_FACT_RECALL_ENABLED0Enable fact-based recall (backward compat alias)
MNEMOSYNE_POLYPHONIC_RECALL0Enable polyphonic recall engine (multi-voice fusion)
MNEMOSYNE_PROACTIVE_LINKING0Enable proactive cross-memory linking on insertion
MNEMOSYNE_BEAM_MODEfalseEnable BEAM mode (polyphonic recall engine extension)

A/B Toggle Flags:

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_GRAPH_BONUS1Graph traversal bonus in recall scoring
MNEMOSYNE_FACT_BONUS1Fact match bonus in recall scoring
MNEMOSYNE_BINARY_BONUS1Binary vector bonus in recall scoring
MNEMOSYNE_LENIENT_FACT_MATCHfalseUse substring instead of exact match for fact recall
MNEMOSYNE_VERACITY_MULTIPLIER1Apply veracity multiplier to recall scores
MNEMOSYNE_CROSS_TIER_DEDUP1Cross-tier deduplication in BEAM recall
MNEMOSYNE_VOICE_VECTOR1Polyphonic vector voice (Phase 3d)
MNEMOSYNE_VOICE_GRAPH1Polyphonic graph voice (Phase 3b)
MNEMOSYNE_VOICE_FACT1Polyphonic fact voice (Phase 3a)
MNEMOSYNE_VOICE_TEMPORAL1Polyphonic temporal voice (Phase 3c)

Sync & Conversation Capture

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_ROLESuser,assistantConversation roles to sync into memory
MNEMOSYNE_SKIP_CONTEXTScron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loopComma-separated context names to skip
MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_TURN_USER_LIMIT500Max chars of user content synced per turn (0=no limit)
MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_TURN_ASSISTANT_LIMIT800Max chars of assistant content synced per turn (0=no limit)

Prefetch

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_PREFETCH_CONTENT_CHARS0Truncate prefetched content to N chars (0=no truncation)
MNEMOSYNE_PREFETCH_PROFILEgeneralPrefetch profile name (general, coding, etc.)

MCP Server

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_MCP_TOKEN—Bearer token for MCP server auth (required for remote deployment)
MNEMOSYNE_MCP_BANKdefaultDefault MCP bank name for tool operations

Author & Channel Metadata

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_ID—Identifier for the author/agent creating memories
MNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_TYPE—Type of author (user, assistant, system)
MNEMOSYNE_CHANNEL_ID—Channel/session identifier for memory scoping
MNEMOSYNE_DEFAULT_OWNERdefaultDefault owner for canonical facts and shared memory

SHMR (Semantic Hierarchical Memory Reorganization)

VariableDefaultDescription
MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_BATCH_SIZE50Max memories per SHMR reorganization batch
MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_MAX_ITERATIONS3Max SHMR clustering iterations per batch
MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD0.70Cosine similarity threshold for memory clustering
MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_HARMONY_THRESHOLD0.60Harmony threshold for cluster merging
MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_MODEL—LLM model for SHMR summarization (empty = use default)
MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_MIN_CLUSTER_SIZE2Minimum memories to form a SHMR cluster
MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_TEMPERATURE0.2LLM temperature for SHMR summarization
